form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after four months ran last of 9 at this track on March 9 over 1000m, in the wet; 31 len behind Nobre Reino carrying 58kg at $3.50. Previously second-up 2nd of 11 at this track on October 18 over 1000m, nose behind Marrocos carrying 58kg at $3. Don't underestimate.
